Explanation: The playoffs column indicates making the playoffs in years listed as qualifiers. They made the playoffs in 2001 (3rd qualifier), 2002 (2nd qualifier), 2003 (2nd qualifier), 2004 (2nd qualifier), 2006 (4th qualifier), 2007 (1st qualifier), and 2008 (2nd qualifier). They did not make the playoffs in 2005, 2009, and 2010. This totals 7 years.
